📝 Visit Today
MAR 24, 2026
Consultation Visit #8
Patient reports 60% improvement in sinusitis. Headaches reduced from daily to 2×/week. Better sleep quality noted.
60% ImprovedFollow-up
DR
Dr. Rizwan · Recorded
💊
💊 Rx
MAR 24, 2026
Nat. Mur 200C + Pulsatilla 30C
Nat. Mur 200C BD for 14 days. Pulsatilla 30C TDS for 7 days. Avoid coffee & raw onion.
200C / 30C14 days
DR
Dr. Rizwan · Prescribed
✅
📈 Improvement
FEB 10, 2026
Major Improvement Noted
Sinus congestion significantly reduced. Sleep improved. No acute headaches past 3 weeks.
Major Improvement
💊
💊 Rx
JAN 28, 2026
Sulphur 30C + Silicea 6C
Sulphur 30C for psoric miasm. Silicea 6C to support elimination. 21-day course.
30C / 6C21 days
⚠️
⚠️ Alert
JAN 12, 2026
Initial Aggravation
Increased sinus discharge, mild fever for 2 days. Expected homeopathic healing response.
AggravationExpected

💬
Case Discussion
Internal clinical reasoning — not patient-visible
DR
Dr. RizwanToday, 2:15 PM
❓ Clinical Question
Patient responding well to Nat. Mur 200C. Should we step down to 30C next cycle? @Dr. Amina your ENT perspective? @Dr. Farhan miasm view?
AM
Dr. AminaToday, 3:00 PM
ENT-wise, sinus discharge transitioning from purulent to clear — good sign. Recommend stepping down to 30C. Continue Pulsatilla as intercurrent for remaining mucous.
DR
Dr. RizwanToday, 4:30 PM
✅ Decision Made
Decision: Step down Nat. Mur to 30C next cycle. Maintain Pulsatilla 30C. Reassess at Apr 7 follow-up.
FK
Dr. FarhanYesterday
🔬 Clinical Analysis
Psoric miasm responding as expected. Initial aggravation → improvement confirms remedy choice. Endorse current plan.
SN
Dr. Sara2 days ago
ℹ️ FYI
Added dietary plan to shared docs. Recommending anti-inflammatory foods & elimination of dairy for 2 weeks.
📌 Action Items

Choose which modules to activate. Recommended features are pre-enabled. Everything can be changed later from Settings.
🧠 AI Prescription Engine Recommended
Auto-suggests remedies based on symptoms, miasm and past cases using Claude AI

Appointment reminders, prescription sharing and follow-up messages via WhatsApp

Create, save and share prescriptions digitally with your clinic header and branding

Track medicine stock, get expiry alerts and auto-deduct when prescriptions are saved

Generate invoices, record payments, accept JazzCash / EasyPaisa / Cash

Revenue trends, patient demographics, top remedies and per-clinic performance

Manage multiple clinic branches from one dashboard with shared patient records
